subcodes.first_line: O Ali! The world is manifest with hypocrisy, save those whom God willeth. Certain souls have been debarred from the Luminary of the horizons [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی عالم بنفاق ظاهر الا من شاء الله بعضی از نفوس را از نیر آفاق منع نموده
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity
